commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
{
  "name": "intellisense-recursion",
  "displayName": "IntelliSense Recursion",
  "description": "Cmd+Click on type names in hover tooltips to navigate to definitions — like IntelliJ IDEA",
  "version": "0.2.2",
  "publisher": "newdlops",
  "license": "MIT",
  "repository": {
    "type": "git",
    "url": "https://github.com/newdlops/intellisense-recursion"
  },
  "keywords": [
    "hover",
    "go to definition",
    "type navigation",
    "intellisense",
    "cmd+click",
    "intellij"
  ],
  "icon": "icon.png",
  "engines": {
    "vscode": "^1.75.0"
  },
  "categories": [
    "Programming Languages",
    "Other"
  ],
  "activationEvents": [
    "onLanguage:python",
    "onLanguage:javascript",
    "onLanguage:typescript",
    "onLanguage:javascriptreact",
    "onLanguage:typescriptreact",
    "onLanguage:java",
    "onLanguage:c",
    "onLanguage:cpp",
    "onLanguage:csharp",
    "onLanguage:go",
    "onLanguage:rust",
    "onLanguage:ruby",
    "onLanguage:php",
    "onLanguage:swift",
    "onLanguage:kotlin",
    "onLanguage:dart"
  ],
  "main": "./out/extension.js",
  "contributes": {
    "commands": [
      {
        "command": "intellisenseRecursion.goToType",
        "title": "Go to Definition (from hover)"
      },
      {
        "command": "intellisenseRecursion.rebuildIndex",
        "title": "IR: Rebuild Symbol Index"
      }
    ]
  },
  "scripts": {
    "vscode:prepublish": "npm run bundle",
    "compile": "tsc -p ./",
    "bundle": "tsc -p ./ && node esbuild.js",
    "watch": "tsc -watch -p ./",
    "pretest": "npm run compile",
    "test": "node ./out/test/runTest.js",
    "test:python": "TEST_FIXTURE=python node ./out/test/runTest.js",
    "test:typescript": "TEST_FIXTURE=typescript node ./out/test/runTest.js",
    "test:javascript": "TEST_FIXTURE=javascript node ./out/test/runTest.js",
    "test:java": "TEST_FIXTURE=java node ./out/test/runTest.js",
    "test:go": "TEST_FIXTURE=go node ./out/test/runTest.js",
    "test:rust": "TEST_FIXTURE=rust node ./out/test/runTest.js",
    "test:cpp": "TEST_FIXTURE=cpp node ./out/test/runTest.js",
    "test:csharp": "TEST_FIXTURE=csharp node ./out/test/runTest.js",
    "test:dart": "TEST_FIXTURE=dart node ./out/test/runTest.js",
    "test:integration": "TEST_FIXTURE=typescript node ./out/test/integration/runTest.js",
    "test:integration:python": "TEST_FIXTURE=python node ./out/test/integration/runTest.js",
    "perf:generate": "node ./out/test/perf/generate-fixtures.js",
    "perf:generate:1m": "PERF_SCALE=1M node ./out/test/perf/generate-fixtures.js",
    "perf:run": "node ./out/test/perf/runTest.js",
    "perf": "npm run compile && npm run perf:generate && npm run perf:run",
    "perf:1m": "npm run compile && npm run perf:generate:1m && npm run perf:run",
    "perf:keep": "PERF_CLEANUP=false npm run perf",
    "package": "npx @vscode/vsce package",
    "deploy:local": "npm run package && code --install-extension intellisense-recursion-$npm_package_version.vsix --force && echo 'Installed! Restart VS Code to activate.'"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/glob": "^8.1.0",
    "@types/mocha": "^10.0.10",
    "@types/node": "^18.0.0",
    "@types/vscode": "^1.75.0",
    "@types/ws": "^8.18.1",
    "@vscode/test-electron": "^2.5.2",
    "esbuild": "^0.28.0",
    "glob": "^13.0.6",
    "mocha": "^11.7.5",
    "typescript": "^5.0.0"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "ws": "^8.20.0"
  }
}
